category_reasoning: genkit@1.21.0 coordinates registered model, flow, tool, retriever, and embedder actions through @genkit-ai/core runInNewSpan; its source does not implement direct provider HTTP requests

implemented_contracts.overloads: two-argument runtime mapping plus source-proven three-argument options index
implemented_contracts.metadata_output_fallback: JSON parse with silent undefined fallback
implemented_contracts.tool_interrupt: tool span receives the observed ToolInterruptError while the enclosing generation can complete successfully

provider_demotion.reason: The LangChain precedent requires a trusted provider tag and enabled provider integration. Genkit runtime context exposes neither, and action-name namespaces are not reliable provider evidence.

architecture_score.result: proposal scores at least 8/10 in all six dimensions

validation.node_check: passed for all three production files

unresolved_runtime_questions: Whether a supported provider LLMObs plugin can run beneath Genkit without duplicate llm spans or token metrics cannot be determined without a trusted provider identity and live trace capture.
Whether native Genkit OpenTelemetry spans coexist as near-duplicate APM spans remains a live observability gate question.
Comprehensive success, error, streaming, nesting, redaction, and event-shape assertions belong to Stage 20 and later runtime gates.
